'''dashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabbalistically|kabbalistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabbalistically|kabbalistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dashate|dashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dashatesher|dashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashatesherĂ«m|dashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dashatero|dashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dashateshĂ«|dashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashateshĂ«m|dashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidashatero|gokidashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidashateshĂ«|gokidashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashateshĂ«m|gokidashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godashankerom|godashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godashankeshĂ«|godashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashankeshĂ«m|godashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godashankeya|godashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dashaterom|dashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashatemu|dashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dashateya|dashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidashaterom|gokidashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashatemu|gokidashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidashateya|gokidashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dashashate|dashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dashashatesher|dashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashashatesherĂ«m|dashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dashashatero|dashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dashashateshĂ«|dashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashashateshĂ«m|dashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidashashatero|gokidashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidashashateshĂ«|gokidashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashashateshĂ«m|gokidashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godashashankerom|godashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godashashankeshĂ«|godashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godashashankeshĂ«m|godashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godashashankeya|godashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dashashaterom|dashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dashashatemu|dashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dashashateya|dashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidashashaterom|gokidashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidashashatemu|gokidashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidashashateya|gokidashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠte|dĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠtesher|dĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠtero|dĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠtero|gokidĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠshĂŠnkerom|godĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠshĂŠnkeya|godĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠterom|dĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠtemu|dĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠshĂŠteya|dĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠterom|gokidĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠshĂŠteya|gokidĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafshafte|dafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafshaftesher|dafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafshaftesherĂ«m|dafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafshaftero|dafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafshafteshĂ«|dafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafshafteshĂ«m|dafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafshaftero|gokidafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafshafteshĂ«|gokidafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafshafteshĂ«m|gokidafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafshafnkerom|godafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafshafnkeshĂ«|godafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafshafnkeshĂ«m|godafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafshafnkeya|godafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafshafterom|dafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafshaftemu|dafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafshafteya|dafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafshafterom|gokidafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafshaftemu|gokidafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafshafteya|gokidafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
